name: pandoc-crossref-helper
description: Local VS Code helpers for Pandoc Markdown labels, cross references, math hovers, and outline symbols.

pandocCrossrefHelper.enableDiagnostics.description: Report undefined Pandoc cross references and duplicate labels in open Markdown documents.

pandocCrossrefHelper.includeWorkspaceRef.description: Index Markdown files in the current workspace when resolving definitions and references.

pandocCrossrefHelper.includeLabelSymbols.description: Add equation, figure, and table labels as nested outline symbols below their nearest heading.
